reasoning: Address poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance by using over-unders within a sub-threshold range. Considering your recent ride and extended rest, we will strategically target the Alpine Loop's requirements to extend your aerobic base and maintain power on sustained climbs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4x10 minute over-unders: 4 minutes at 205W (85%), 3 minutes at 250W (105%), 3 minutes at 215W (90%). 2-minute easy spins between each set.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
